title: OWill Champagne Gold Satin Ribbon, Double Sided Polyester 20mm X 22m(24 Yards) Gift Wrapping Ribbon for Cake Decoration, DIY Sewing Project, Party Balloon Decoration & Hair Bows
features: 【High Quality Ribbon】each roll of gold satin ribbon is 20mm (≈0.8 in) in width and 22m (≈24 yards) in length. each roll of champagne gold ribbon is made of high-quality polyester, one side can be very smooth and colored, it is your best choice for diy projects.

【Multi-Purpose Ribbon】these beautiful ribbons for gift wrapping can be used in various gift boxes, such as birthday gift boxes, wedding gift boxes, souvenir boxes, cake boxes and cookie boxes. it can also be used to bandage flowers and wedding invitations. the length of each roll of ribbon can meet your needs, and it can be decorated with beautiful bows.

【Suitable for the Scene】these beautiful ribbons are suitable for many scenes, such as birthday parties, weddings, anniversary parties, easter, halloween, thanksgiving, christmas and other events and holiday decorations. it can create a good atmosphere for your activities and festivals and increase the sense of ceremony.

【Wide Range of Uses】these gold ribbons are not only used for scene layout and gift packaging, but can also be used to make personal diy crafts. they can be used under sewing machines, embroidery machines, and knitting machines, and can be turned into beautiful hairbands, unique bridal bracelets, and bridesmaid wristbands. flowers, brooches and pet decorations, etc.

【Quality Service】if you have any questions or dissatisfaction with the product, please contact us at any time. we will provide you with the best solution in the first time. your satisfaction is our eternal pursuit.
description: Product Description OWill Ribbon is made of 100% polyester fabric, the fabric is shiny, smooth and soft to the touch, it can meet various decorative needs in your daily life. Material: Polyester Width: 20mm/0.8in Length: 22m (24 Yards) Color:black, white, red, green, gold, pink, sky blue, purple,mint green,brown,peach Double Sided Polyester Gift Wrap Ribbon OWill Ribbons are made of high-quality polyester, which is smooth and soft for style and quality. SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE OCCASIONS: Our ribbons can be used in many occasions such as birthday parties, weddings, Christmas, Halloween, anniversary parties, Thanksgiving and other events and holiday decorations. Notice 1. The size of the ribbon is measured manually, and the width may vary by 1-2mm. 2. Due to differences in light, monitors, etc., the actual color of the ribbon may be different, please refer to the actual color. Home Decoration Use our ribbons to decorate your home like wine bottles, stairs, gates and more. Gift Wrapping Our ribbons are satin finish and are used for gift wrapping, which can make your gift more beautiful. Bouquet Packaging These ribbons can be used for flower wrapping and are the best choice for weddings and various holiday decorations. DIY Small Objects You can DIY anything you like with ribbons during the holidays,it will give you a lot of fun.
